data.title: Gas Thyristor market expected to reach USD 2,172.33 billion by 2032 globally, correction from earlier announcement.
data.description: The Gas Thyristor Market is projected to achieve a value of approximately USD 2,172.33 billion by the year 2032 on a global scale, as per the latest report from Credence Research. However, a news release issued on Jan. 27, 2026, reveals that there were inaccuracies in the initial version shared by Credence Research Inc. via PR Newswire. The updated information provides a more accurate analysis of the market's growth potential.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers to stop using Amber Brook Pool Drain Covers due to serious safety risks. View warnings at www.cpsc.gov.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued product safety warnings regarding Amber Brook Pool Drain Covers. Consumers are urged to discontinue the use of these covers immediately due to the risk of serious safety issues. For more information on product safety warnings and recalls, visit www.cpsc.gov. Stay informed to protect yourself and your loved ones.

data.title: Dover Corporation (DOV) beats Q4 expectations with $2.099B revenue, up 9%, $2.51 EPS. Segment margin 22.8%, free cash flow $486.96M. President: strong demand ahead.
data.description: Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) released its fourth-quarter results, surpassing earnings and revenue forecasts. The quarter saw Dover's revenue reach $2.099 billion, marking a 9% increase and exceeding the anticipated $2.082 billion. Adjusted diluted earnings per share from continuing operations amounted to $2.51, a 14% rise from the previous year and surpassing the expected $2.48. The total segment margin rose to 22.8% from 22.2% the previous year. Non-GAAP quarterly free cash flow hit $486.96 million, and cash and cash equivalents stood at $1.67 billion. Dover's President and CEO, Richard J. Tobin, emphasized the strong top-line performance across the portfolio in the fourth quarter.

data.title: Historic Grant Building in downtown Atlanta (125,000 SF, 10-story) available through bankruptcy sale with Hilco Global.
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, on January 29, 2026, the real estate group Hilco Global announced that they are currently open for offers for the Grant Building. This property is located in downtown Atlanta and spans approximately 125,000 square feet over 10 stories. The site presents various prospects for redevelopment for hospitality and mixed-use purposes. The opportunity to acquire this property is being facilitated through a bankruptcy sale.

data.title: Hospice nurse from Burnsville, Minn invents THE COMFORT MED HELPER for medication delivery, provides comfort & sanitary practice.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, an inventor from Burnsville, Minnesota expressed their motivation behind creating a novel medical device. The inventor, who works as a hospice nurse, aimed to enhance the delivery of medication to the sphincter, ileostomy, and colostomy in a more comfortable and sanitary manner. This led to the invention of THE COMFORT MED HELPER. The innovative design of this device effectively addresses the need for improved medication delivery in these specific medical scenarios.

data.title: Pennsylvania chooses InVita's Track-Kit for state's sexual assault kit tracking system, providing survivors visibility.
data.description: A new initiative in Pennsylvania will allow survivors of sexual violence to track the status and location of their sexual assault kits. Beginning in 2026, this statewide program aims to provide transparency and empowerment to survivors. InVita Healthcare Technologies, a prominent software solutions provider, is spearheading this effort. This initiative will ensure that survivors have access to vital information regarding their kits, enhancing their ability to navigate the legal process and seek justice.

data.title: Populous adds 2 global operation roles with Gavin Houldin as Global COO. Expanding operational capacity worldwide.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on January 29, 2026, a renowned Design and Architecture firm, Populous, revealed the addition of two key global positions to enhance its operational capabilities on an international scale. Gavin Houldin has been brought on board as the Global Chief Operating Officer to oversee operations. This strategic move aims to bolster the firm's presence worldwide and drive its growth trajectory.

data.title: CAE will announce Q3 FY2026 results on Feb 12 after close. Conference call for analysts on Feb 13 at 8:00 a.m.
data.description: Montreal-based company CAE, listed on NYSE and TSX as CAE, is set to report its third quarter financial results on February 12, 2026, post market closure. Followed by this release, there will be a conference call on February 13 at 8:00 a.m. This call is open to analysts and institutional investors interested in understanding the company's performance and financial standing.

data.title: FLOKI at oversold RSI 34.44, targeting rebound to $0.000043-$0.000072 range as meme coin seeks support bounce.
data.description: With an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) level of 34.44, the meme coin FLOKI is currently being traded. Analysts are expecting a potential recovery in the range of $0.000043 to $0.000072. The coin is seeking a bounce in support as it aims to stabilize and increase in value.
